results.content: find a course that truly speaks to your musical aspirations, one that resonates with your unique creative voice. Inspired by Arnold Schoenberg’s seminal work “Fundamentals of Musical Composition,” our curriculum explores the foundational elements of classical music across the Baroque, Classical, and Romantic periods, guiding you through the ‘why’ behind the music, not just the ‘how.’. Through a series of engaging lessons, hands-on assignments, and supportive feedback, this course is [...] this course is meticulously structured to nurture your own creative voice within the disciplined forms of classical music. Whether you’re a music theory student eager to expand your knowledge, a composition student refining your skills, or simply passionate about acquiring a deeper understanding of classical music, this course is specifically designed with you in mind. ##### Join us to explore the beautiful complexities of classical music composition. We are committed to supporting and [...] to supporting and accompanying you every step of the way, ensuring you not only achieve technical proficiency but also discover and cultivate your unique musical voice in a warm and responsive educational environment. ##### Let’s start this musical journey together—enrol now and transform your passion into a masterpiece. results.title: Alternative ways to compose music
results.content: Alternative ways to compose music [...] explore new ways to communicate musically. This is a technique used in poetry and visual art by which a piece is collectively created. First, determine the rules: how many bars each participant can write each turn, the key, etc. Now create a new score in Flat and write your part. Send it to the next participant. Participant number 2 must create a new score and write only his contribution. Then, send it to participant 3. The idea is, starting from the exquisite corpse, make adjustments, add [...] adjustments, add parts, to create a song. You will need paper, a pencil, and a bag or bowl. You are going to create strips of paper on which you are going to write random melodies. That's your exquisite cadaver, and it is time to start working on the song in your music notation software. ### 2.Composing using a text. results.title: Stream your own music with Navidrome, a Spotify alternative • Linux Boards
results.content: Install Docker and Docker Compose. If Docker and Docker Compose aren’t installed yet, run the following commands:. Set up Navidrome with Docker Compose. mkdir -p ~/navidrome/{music,data} && cd ~/navidrome mkdir -p ~/navidrome/{music,data} && cd ~/navidrome {} && cd. Create a `docker-compose.yml` file in the directory with the following content:. services: services: services: navidrome: navidrome: navidrome: image: deluan/navidrome:latest image: deluan/navidrome:latest image: [...] anywhere. In this guide, we’ll show you how to set up Navidrome on a single board computer like the Raspberry Pi, turning it into your personal Spotify alternative. ## Why Navidrome? Navidrome is a lightweight and fast music streaming server.  Privacy-first: Your data stays on your server, ensuring full control over your music.  Docker Compose: Installed on your SBC.  Navidrome: The software itself, available for free.  Music library: Your personal collection ready for streaming. Install Docker [...] - ./navidrome.toml:/config/navidrome.toml:ro ./navidrome.toml:/config/navidrome.toml:ro. Create the configuration file for Navidrome. You can generate your own with your password manager like Bitwarden or with OpenSSL:. Now the most exciting part of the guide: running our own music streaming service. It’s highly recommended to see the Docker Compose logs to check that everything is running correctly. Just browse to Navidrome’s homepage at and you will be greeted with a screen like this:. >
